standards/gha-commit-subjects:
```text
Commit subject MUST:
- ticket prefix: sctaskN | incN | DCDT-N (optional :)
- keyword: feat|fix|chore|docs|refactor|perf|test|style
- empty subject fails; Merge commits exempt
- Dependabot SHOULD: DCDT-0000 chore
SemVer: feat=minor; fix|chore=patch; docs|refactor|perf|test|style=none
Release needs ≥1 feat|fix|chore since last tag
```
standards/gha-component-layout:
```text
Layout MUST:
- actions/{category}/{name}/ → action.yml|yaml + readme.md
- workflows/{category}/{name}/ → exactly one workflow.yml|yaml + readme.md
- component_path starts with actions/ or workflows/
- categories today: actions common|security; workflows common
FORBIDDEN: trees outside actions|workflows; multi workflow YAML per dir
```
standards/gha-spvs-yaml:
```text
SPVS MUST (workflow/composite):
- every job: permissions: (workflows)
- bash run: set -euo pipefail; no set -x
- no ${{ inputs.* }} in run — map via env
- uses: 40-char SHA | ./ | docker:// | /actions/ tag; no ../
- no write-all; no pull_request_target; no bare self-hosted
- no curl|bash; no AWS_ACCESS_KEY_ID/SECRET/SESSION static env
- contents:write jobs need environment:
```
standards/metadata-headers:
```text
Metadata MUST on new files: file_name, description, version, authors.
On new functions/classes: intent, input, output, role, side_effects.
Snake_case field names; match existing kernel header style.
```
standards/okf-prompt-injection:
```text
Anytime Aegis: lookup/pack first (cards ≤150 tok; pack ≤400 tok).
Ladder: OKF → card pointers → task corpus → live Git/OCI → write-back.
Grader: explain/fix only. Catalogs: vault-first; pack_force_when honored.
FORBIDDEN: stub-as-design; brain dump; skip lookup; mine grader while authoring.
```
standards/simplicity-first:
```text
Rule #1 Laziness Ladder: simplest shortest minimal solution that works.
Prefer reuse → one-file edit → one small file → tooling → abstraction (last).
Smallest diff; stdlib scripts; no new dirs/types without justification.
```
vault/concepts/aegis-capability-discover:
```text
Non-trivial: okf.py capabilities [--json] before pack/OpenSpec.
Enable features from report; no tool assumptions.
States: READY|BLOCKED|PENDING_APPROVAL|EXECUTING|ROLLED_BACK|COMPLETE
(exit derived). Gate checkbox → PENDING_APPROVAL (exit 1).
Brain+OpenSpec missing → BLOCKED exit 4. Fallback probes if no Python.
```
vault/concepts/component-tagging:
```text
Tags: versioned {safe_name}-{X.Y.Z}; stable {safe_name}-v1.
safe_name = basename(component_path); duplicate basenames rejected.
Promote = delete+recreate stable tag at target SHA (never force-push).
Workflow release also syncs .github/workflows/{name}.yml before tagging.
```
vault/concepts/extending-aegis:
```text
New knowledge MUST: pick type/dir from the table (standards/, vault/*),
add required frontmatter (type,title,description,tags,timestamp,status),
then run okf.py compile + okf.py lint from the package dir.
Follow vault/playbooks/maintain-aegis-system.md end-to-end.
```
vault/concepts/gha-ci-pipeline-recipe:
```text
CI multi-job MUST: checkout; upload-artifact+download-artifact for cross-job;
OWASP via ./actions/security/owasp-dependency-check.
FORBIDDEN: stub local staging as design; @vN tags.
Missing pins → corpus → live → write-back (never Conftest-green stubs).
```
vault/concepts/gha-yaml-anchors:
```text
YAML anchors (&) / aliases (*) reuse nodes within ONE workflow file only.
Alias = exact copy; merge keys (<<:) FORBIDDEN on GitHub Actions.
Cross-file or parameterized reuse -> reusable workflow / composite action.
Tiny duplication? Skip anchors (Simplicity First).
```
vault/concepts/github-actions:
```text
GHA domain: route to layout + gha-spvs-yaml + release-manager-modes cards.
Components under actions/{cat}/{name}/ or workflows/{cat}/{name}/ only.
Inject slim cards — never full SPVS/layout docs.
```
vault/concepts/release-manager-modes:
```text
Release Manager (workflow_dispatch): inputs component_path, mode, version(optional).
release = versioned tag + FULL security stage (Conftest/Actionlint/Bandit/Shellcheck).
promote = move {safe_name}-v1 to chosen tag (security skipped, env production).
rollback = v1 to previous versioned tag; restore synced workflow file if needed.
```
vault/concepts/semver-from-commits:
```text
SemVer from commits since last {safe_name}-* tag:
feat -> minor; fix/chore -> patch; docs/refactor/perf/test/style -> no bump.
No prior tag -> first release is 1.0.0. No bump-capable commits -> release FAILS.
Explicit version input bypasses auto-calculation.
```
vault/concepts/spvs-lifecycle:
```text
SPVS stages: Plan=commit-msg+SemVer; Integrate=pre-commit Conftest/Actionlint/Bandit/Shellcheck;
Release=RM security+tags; Operate=promote/rollback v1.
Branch protection/CODEOWNERS = GitHub settings, not YAML.
Dependency-Check: Podman/ARC runners only — no Docker-only assumptions.
```
vault/playbooks/author-gha-composite-act:
```text
New composite action: actions/{category}/{name}/ with action.yml + short readme.md.
Shell: set -euo pipefail; map inputs via env (no ${{ inputs.* }} in run);
pin third-party uses: to 40-char SHA (use pin cache on CKV2_SPVS_5).
Gate: conftest test --parser yaml -n composite -p policies/conftest/github_actions/{composite,lib}.
PR subject: ticket-prefixed conventional commit.
```
vault/playbooks/bootstrap-spvs-dev-envir:
```text
Bootstrap: bash policies/scripts/install_hooks.sh from monorepo root;
pre-commit install; smoke with pre-commit run --all-files.
Verify: commit-msg rejects non-ticket subjects; policies/tests/run_tests.sh exits 0.
```
vault/playbooks/maintain-aegis-system:
```text
Brain mutations MUST: correct type/dir; frontmatter; cross-links; index.md; log.md.
Standards MUST ship ## Prompt Card (≤600 chars). After change: compile then lint (0 errors).
OpenSpec archive: ALWAYS Rung 1 _inbox; Rung 2 only via full maintain checklist (else defer).
```
vault/playbooks/release-gha-component:
```text
Release: Actions -> Release Manager (workflow_dispatch); set component_path + mode
(release|promote|rollback), optional version. Auto-bump needs feat/fix/chore commits
since last tag. Verify remote tag ({safe_name}-{X.Y.Z} or -v1) and synced workflow file.
```
vault/playbooks/run-gha-local-policy-tes:
```text
Full gate: bash policies/tests/run_tests.sh (exit 0 required).
Single file: conftest test --parser yaml -n workflow|composite
  -p policies/conftest/github_actions/{workflow|composite} -p .../lib <file>.
Rego changed? pre-commit run --all-files. Skips need SPVS_SKIP_POLICY + SPVS_SKIP_REASON.
```

```text

Missing pin → corpus → live Git → write-back.
```

vault/references/gha-reusable-readme:
```text
Source of truth: gha-reusable-actions-workflows/README.md (local clone).
Covers Release Manager lifecycle, commit format, SPVS catalog, scan commands.
Clone gaps: docs/ chapters and okf_bundle/ missing — re-fetch before citing.
```
vault/systems/gha-reusable-actions-workf:
```text
Monorepo: actions/{cat}/{name}/ (action.yml+readme.md); workflows/{cat}/{name}/
(workflow.yml+readme.md); Rego in policies/conftest/github_actions/.
Release plane: release -> promote -> rollback; tags {safe_name}-{X.Y.Z} / -v1.
Needs GitHub App secrets RELEASE_APP_ID / RELEASE_APP_PRIVATE_KEY.
```
